decisions.rationale: IR re-read (ir/refs.json style_ref on ai_RNbBHYWV→Group_card_, ai_RNbBHYWX→Text_heading_2_, ai_RNbBHYWY→Text_small_, bTIiC Dropdown_default_) confirms prototype divergence: Group_card_muted_, Text_heading_3_, Input_default_, and coaching-card/disclaimer copy differ from Bubble presentation.text on ai_RNbBHYWX/ai_RNbBHYWY/ai_RNbBHYWs. Valid ui-fidelity gap on named SET-03 ui_refs and review ui_evidence partial/fail rows, but criteria_audit AC-1..AC-3 and functional_audit FV-1..FV-3 all pass; AC-1 gates data-bubble-id on group nodes ai_RNbBHYWV/ai_RNbBHYWW/ai_RNbBHYWZ (leaf title/subtitle markers optional per SET-01 intermediate-node precedent); AC-2 dropdown options and disclaimer banner render with functional ENUM-03 wiring. Style token swaps are DS-01 token-bridge polish (mirrors DASH-02 C-2, CRISIS-01 C-2); verbatim IR copy on header/disclaimer/placeholder is easy SettingsCoachingTab.tsx alignment (~10 lines) batchable in a settings visual-parity pass with SET-01 chrome deferrals. No downstream item lists SET-03 in depends_on.

Code review confirms save button disabled={saving || !mode} blocks the empty-selection path even though updateCoachingModePreference already implements Bubble bTIVe simplifier-reset when mode is "". Valid workflow parity note vs Bubble coaching-save, but AC-3 scopes save workflow to persisting a selected mode and post-save reload — not mandatory empty-save. Mirrors DASH-02 C-3 deferral: empty-selection branch is optional Bubble workflow edge case; shadcn Select has no clear affordance and disabling save when unset is reasonable UX. Enabling empty-save is a one-line disabled change plus QA; does not block SET-04..SET-10 depends_on gates (none depend on SET-03).

Coverage JSON omits functional_verification and ui_evidence sections while claiming 100%; reviewer independently derived FV-1..FV-3 and ui_evidence rows. Valid audit-traceability gap on the coverage artifact only — implementation source and review report already document evidence. Low-priority cycle hygiene to enrich cursor-impl-cycle/output/coverage/SET-03-coaching-tab-and-save.json on a future implement or re-review pass; does not affect coaching tab behavior or advance gates.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 IR copy/style parity on coaching card header, dropdown placeholder, and disclaimer (DS-01 token + settings visual QA batch with SET-01); C-2 empty-selection save / simplifier-reset workflow (optional Bubble parity, API already supports); C-3 coverage artifact functional_verification and ui_evidence rows (audit traceability on next pass). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
